rationale: Educ. Code §12.063 governs charter school probation and revocation by boards of trustees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A board of trustees may place on probation or revoke a charter it grants if the board determines that the campus or program
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and charter school probation/revocation statute.
